docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00<WAIVED>);THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. VIA VOICE MAIL, PER ADAM(THE CURRENT OCCUPANT AS OF OCTOBER 1,2012),RYAN MOORE MUST HAVE BEEN THE PREVIOUS TENANT AND NO LONGER LIVES AT THE ABOVE ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBIERI, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RYAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
